headline: Analysts Bullish on Costco Wholesale (COST) Despite Increasing Concerns Regarding Membership Growth Trends and Valuation
summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) is included in our list of the 11 most overvalued companies according to the media. As of March 20, 2026, Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) has positive sentiment from 60% of covering analysts. The consensus price target ($1,100.00) suggests 13% upside potential. Amid increasing concerns regarding membership growth trends and valuation, the […]

headline: Costco's new energy drink delights fans, rattles competition
summary: Costco isn't the sort of business to stay complacent. A big reason members are so willing to pay a fee to walk in the door isn't just to save money on bulk purchases. It's also a matter of getting access to quality products. To that end, Costco's Kirkland Signature line truly shines. Though a lot ...

headline: Celsius Stock Jolted After Costco Offers Energy-Drink Brand for Less
summary: Costco recently introduced energy drinks under Kirkland Signature, its private-label brand that has gained a devoted following among its membership for selling everything from toilet paper to vodka at lower prices than those of some national brands.

headline: COSW Sells Away Costco’s Upside Each Week to Fund Its Distributions
summary: Costco has been one of retail’s most reliable compounders for a decade, and that consistency has made it a natural candidate for yield-seeking investors who want income from a stock that rarely offers much. The Roundhill COST WeeklyPay ETF (CBOE:COSW) launched in October 2025 to serve exactly that audience: investors who want exposure to Costco ... COSW Sells Away Costco’s Upside Each Week to Fund Its Distributions

headline: Jamie Dimon’s ‘Skunk at the Party’ Warning: Here’s How I’d Prepare for Stubborn Inflation
summary: Whenever the great Jamie Dimon speaks, it can pay dividends to listen up. Of course, investors should do their own homework, rather than taking a guru’s word for it. But, in any case, Dimon’s recent warnings with regard to inflation, I believe, are more than warranted, especially after the Iran war-induced surge in oil prices. ... Jamie Dimon’s ‘Skunk at the Party’ Warning: Here’s How I’d Prepare for Stubborn Inflation
